data.text:
Completed as an evidence-only closeout.

- The guardrails were already present:
  - `--no-review` requires `--no-review-i-know-what-im-doing` in [cli/cmd/try.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-86996834-20260506T023305-7e7c99b1/cli/cmd/try.go) and [cli/cmd/work.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-86996834-20260506T023305-7e7c99b1/cli/cmd/work.go)
  - `review:skip` is ignored unless paired with `review:skip-reason:*` in [cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_post_review.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-86996834-20260506T023305-7e7c99b1/cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_post_review.go)
- The existing tests already cover both rules:
  - [cli/cmd/try_test.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-86996834-20260506T023305-7e7c99b1/cli/cmd/try_test.go)
  - [cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_test.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-86996834-20260506T023305-7e7c99b1/cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review_test.go)
- I added the evidence file at [`.ddx/executions/20260506T023305-7e7c99b1/no_changes_rationale.txt`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-86996834-20260506T023305-7e7c99b1/.ddx/executions/20260506T023305-7e7c99b1/no_changes_rationale.txt) and verified it with:
  - `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run 'TestTry_NoReviewRequiresAckFlag|TestTry_CommandRegistered|TestWorkHelpDocumentsReviewGuardrails' && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestExecuteBeadWorkerReviewSkipLabelWithoutReasonIsIgnored|TestExecuteBeadWorkerReviewSkipLabelWithReasonSkipsReviewer'`
- Commit: `cb9dde98` `chore: record no-change evidence [ddx-86996834]`

Worktree is clean.
